Type errors stop the run before directive checks, with no follow-on noise.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

//fabrik:provider
func NewA() *Missing1 { return nil }

//fabrik:provider
func NewB() *Missing2 { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:4:14: undefined: Missing1
error: web/web.go:7:14: undefined: Missing2
